name: libadwaita
description: Building blocks library for modern GNOME applications — widgets implementing the GNOME HIG.

seo.title: libadwaita — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: libadwaita: Building blocks library for modern GNOME applications — widgets implementing the GNOME HIG.

when_to_use: Building a modern GNOME app with HIG-compliant widgets
GTK4 app with libadwaita adaptive layout for GNOME Shell
Open-source Linux utility following GNOME design patterns
Responsive desktop app with mobile-friendly Adwaita widgets
Consistent GNOME app experience across screen sizes

pros: Active Red Hat and GNOME backing
cons: GNOME-specific, poor on KDE and Windows
review.verdict: The right choice for modern GNOME apps, the wrong choice for anything cross-desktop.
review.best_for: Developers targeting GNOME apps matching the HIG with modern widgets
review.not_for: Cross-platform or KDE-focused developers wanting platform neutrality

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
